pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5) mentions ne:ne_populated_places; setup_geoserver.sh line 120 imports as 'ne_populated_places'
task.json description (line 5) and setup_geoserver.sh lines 137-188 which publishes layers in 'ne' workspace
task.json description (line 5) explicitly states 'scale denominator is less than 20,000,000'; verifier.py line 96 confirms range [15000000, 25000000] for checking values around 20M
verifier.py line 96 checks range if 15000000 <= val <= 25000000, which is ±5,000,000 around 20M (20M - 5M = 15M, 20M + 5M = 25M)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an SLD style named 'scaled_cities' in the 'ne' workspace for the 'ne_populated_places' layer from the Natural Earth Populated Places 110m dataset. The style must use a MaxScaleDenominator of 20,000,000 to show labels only when zoomed in (scale denominator < 20M), with a red circle point marker at all scales. The verifier accepts scale denominator values within a tolerance of ±5,000,000 around 20M (range 15M-25M).
